title: Goodbye Broadway
writer: James Gleason, Roy Chanslor, A. Dorian Otvos
actors: Alice Brady, Charles Winninger, Tom Brown
plot: Pat and Molly Malloy, once famed vaudeville and Broadway performers, arrive to play the small town of Hamilton, Conn. with a troupe of dancers, singers, a trained dog and an educated seal. Harry Clark, the clerk at the rundown Swa...
